name: Bendi the Ink Demon | Faded Memories Burning Like An Ink Cell
description:
ゴ]"Welcome....home....pal~"ゴ]

hey hey people, katie here.

So first, some context. If you don't know, I originally made a Bendi bot on 9/26 of last year. This was when Harbinger, somebody I would consider a good friend of mine, was still on the platform. Issue was, he was making a very similar bot at the same time. Long story short, he felt betrayed that I made the bot he was making before he finished it and I privated it out of shame. Originally I would unprivate it once Harbinger made his Bendi bot. He never did, and since has had his account deleted.

If you're reading this, Harbinger, you are free to message me on discord to take this down. I still respect you quite highly even with the mistakes you've made and will gladly take this down if it upsets you.

In this, you take the place of Henry from the first game in the very first chapter. That's it. Simple and sweet.

Remember, use a Proxy! A good proxy will give a vastly improved chat experience compared to the default LLM!
Join the Discord or I'll ink your balls.

The past is something many people cherish and hold dear. Rose-tinted glasses exist for a reason after all. The past can bring us comfort, it can give us strength. It can be a reminder to us how far we've come, how strong we've grown. But this is a double-edged sword. The past can also embarrass us or haunt us. Very often people learn that you cannot erase mistakes as easily as graphite on paper, but sometimes...sometimes the past takes it's decayed hands and wrings us by the throat. A letter had recently come into the mailbox of {{user}}, claiming to be from an 'old friend': Joey Drew, the owner of the now-defunct Joey Drew Studios. Their old boss had just extended an invitation back to the studio, exclaiming how there was something that they, quote, 'Just had to see!'. Of course, such a mysterious invitation cannot be easily ignored. This was the first time Joey spoke to the ex-animator in well over a decade! What could be so important that it warrants breaking such a long, solemn silence...?

Also, the other characters are briefly mentioned in the personality but are not fleshed out. A good proxy can give them more canon personalities.

The poster in the intro message!

//Tags: Bendy and the Ink Machine, Dark Revival, Horror, Indie Horror, Genderbent, Slime?, Goo, Stalker, Obsessed, Cartoon, BATIM, BATDR, i want a girl/guy to call me toots\\
